onboarding.body1: Generate structured bug reports and test assets directly from Jira stories.
onboarding.body2: Use the field-mapping wizard to connect AI output to your Jira project fields, then reuse it.
onboarding.body3: Compare revisions, undo edits, check duplicates, and publish only the findings you trust.
mapping.title: Field Mapping Wizard
mapping.help: Map AI fields to Jira fields once per project and issue type. BugMind reuses the mapping for future generation and publishing.
history.title: History
help.aiOptions: AI options control how many findings are generated and which Jira issue type receives them.
help.quotas: Quota usage is counted when generation succeeds.
